reforms.description: The Industrial Training Authority (AnCo) plans to open three additional training centers in 1972, which will double the training capacity and focus on skilled worker training through accelerated methods.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing training capacity, the reform aims to enhance the skills of the workforce, which supports productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The training centers are planned to open in 1972, indicating implementation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The expansion of training centers is significant but not a structural overhaul of the training system.
reforms.source_quote: The Industrial Training Authority (AnCo) to open further three training centres in 1972, with an annual capacity of 1,200 workers.

reforms.description: The IDA has initiated regional planning by opening regional offices and drafting eight regional industrialization plans to be submitted to the Government for approval.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By promoting regional industrialization, the initiative aims to foster local economic development and support the growth of innovative firms.
reforms.status_evidence: The IDA has already initiated the planning process, indicating implementation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of regional offices and plans is significant for local economic strategy but not a comprehensive reform.
reforms.source_quote: The IDA has proceeded with regional planning, opening regional offices in early 1971 and drawing up eight regional industrialisation plans.
